description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style outdoor air conditioning unit with a weathered, off-white metal casing and visible signs of rust and wear. The front face features a large, circular metal grille protecting the fan, with a smaller rectangular vent and some Japanese text printed on the lower left. The sides of the unit have additional vent panels and protruding metal pipes, likely for refrigerant and electrical connections. The back is mostly plain, with two sturdy metal legs for support and a pair of thick, black pipes extending outward. The overall construction suggests durability for outdoor urban environments, and the unit is elevated slightly above the ground by its metal feet.
description: A weathered, rectangular outdoor air conditioner with a large circular grille, side vents, and protruding pipes, designed for urban exterior installation.
description_view_0: Side view showing a vented panel with horizontal slats and a small access hatch, plus visible rust and weathering.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned metal surface with two supporting legs and protruding black pipes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a small access hatch and a single pipe emerging from the lower section.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a large circular grille for the fan, a smaller rectangular vent, and some Japanese text on the lower left.
attribute_brand_logo: Small Japanese text printed on the lower left of the front face; no distinct logo emblem visible.
attribute_grille_pattern: Large circular grille with concentric rings and radial spokes, tightly spaced for fan protection.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: One large circular exhaust vent with a metal grille on the front face; additional smaller rectangular vent to the left.
